name: Real Man's Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped fresh or frozen broccoli (up to 3/4 cup)
1/2 cup chopped fresh or frozen cauliflower (up to 3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions: Optional: Add 3/4 cup tuna, ham, turkey, crumbled bacon or sausage (cooked meats) to make a complete main course. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Prepare a 9-inch pie shell that is at least 2 inches deep. Scald the milk and heat until the cheese melts, stirring until melted. Remove from heat and beat in one egg at a time. Add salt and pepper. Place vegetables and meats (optional) in the shell; pour the egg mixture into the shell. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until golden brown and firm. Cool and serve near room temperature.
